issue.body:
### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking) [https://music.bugs.co.kr/search](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fmusic.bugs.co.kr%2Fsearch) ### Comment > 음악 스트리밍 사이트 벅스 music.bugs.co.kr 에서 검색어를 입력했을시 해당 스크린샷 처럼 아무것도 뜨지 않는 현상이 간간히 발생합니다 예전에 추적 보호에서 ip주소 숨기기를 했을때는 어떤걸 검색해도 스크린샷 같이 아무것도 뜨지 않는 현상이 발생했었거든요 그래서 이 옵션은 해제를 하고 사용하고 있는데.. 검색어를 입력할때마다 이런 현상이 간간히 자주 발생하고 있어서 이번에도 애드 가드 문제가 아닐까 생각중입니다 어떤 옵션 때문인지 이런 현상이 생기는지는 잘 모르겠습니다 간간히 발생하는것이라 다시 검색하면 제대로 뜰때가 많아서 옵션을 하나 하나 껏다 켰다 해서 이 옵션이 문제인지 아닌지 확실하게 알수가 없습니다 5월달부터 해당 문제가 발생한것 같고 그렇게 오래 되지는 않았습니다 추적 보호나 네트워크 관련 문제인듯 한데 도저히 어떤것인지 알수 없어서 답답합니다 어떤것 때문인지 확실하게 말해 드릴수 없어서 정말 죄송합니다 ### Screenshots

comment.body:
This issue has been automatically marked as stale because it has been open for 3 days with no activity.
Unfortunately, our resources are limited and we can not always take the time to respond to requests about websites that are not popular enough. The issue will be closed if no further activity occurs.
Please note, that AdGuard Filters is an open-source project that is used by different content blockers and we welcome contributions. If you have some technical knowledge about how websites work, you are welcome to create a pull request following [these instructions](https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md).

comment.body:
This issue has been automatically marked as stale because it has been open for 7 days with no activity.
Unfortunately, our resources are limited and we can not always take the time to respond to requests about websites that are not popular enough. The issue will be closed if no further activity occurs.
Please note, that AdGuard Filters is an open-source project that is used by different content blockers and we welcome contributions. If you have some technical knowledge about how websites work, you are welcome to create a pull request following [these instructions](https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md).

comment.body: > This issue has been automatically marked as stale because it has been open for 3 days with no activity. Unfortunately, our resources are limited and we can not always take the time to respond to requests about websites that are not popular enough. The issue will be closed if no further activity occurs. Please note, that AdGuard Filters is an open-source project that is used by different content blockers and we welcome contributions. If you have some technical knowledge about how websites work, you are welcome to create a pull request following [these instructions](https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md).

### Prerequisites

- [x] This site DOES NOT contain sexually explicit material, otherwise use [NSFW-specific form](./new?template=bug_report_NSFW.yml);
- [x] Filters were updated before reproducing an issue;
- [x] AdGuard product version is up-to-date;
- [x] Browser version is up-to-date;
- [x] If the site or app is broken, disabling AdGuard protection resolves an issue.

### What product do you use?

AdGuard for Windows

### AdGuard version

5.4.3.41

### What type of problem have you encountered?

Missed ads or ad leftovers

### Which browser(s) do you use?

Chrome

### Which device do you use?

Desktop

### Where is the problem encountered?

https://player.videasy.to/movie/299534

### Ad Blocking

AdGuard Base filter

### Privacy

EasyPrivacy

### Social Widgets

_No response_

_No response_

_No response_

### Other

_No response_

### DNS filters

_No response_

### Language-specific

_No response_

### What Stealth Mode options do you have enabled?

_No response_

### Add your comment and screenshots

Hello! The domain for the Videasy player has recently changed from videasy.net to videasy.to.

Could you please duplicate/update the existing filters for videasy.net to also include the new .to TLD?

For context, here are the existing rules that need the videasy.to domain added:

SpywareFilter/sections/specific.txt (||users.videasy.net/api/track)
BaseFilter/sections/general_extensions.txt (videasy.net popunder rules)
BaseFilter/sections/allowlist_stealth.txt (player.videasy.net stealth rules)
AnnoyancesFilter/Other/sections/tweaks.txt (player.videasy.net context menu tweaks)
Thank you!

### Privacy

- [x] I agree to follow this condition

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking) [https://billbill.com/](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fbillbill.com%2F) ### Comment > #概述 > 此问题由“拦截 ETag 和 If - None - Match 标头”功能造成，关闭后恢复正常。 > > ##已造成的问题（**以复现成功率，从高到低排序**） > 1. 非AD营销界面无法加载，即使相关过滤器已关闭。 > 2. 其他用户的个人空间无法加载。 > 3. 视频/直播加载失败，或相关功能（如评论、点赞）不可用，即使相关过滤器已关闭。 > 4. 视频刷新失败。 > 5. 主页加载失败。 > > ###附注 > 1. 已尝试使用AdGuard DNS 私人服务器，并对本地与服务器过滤日志进行审查。除部分域名被错误屏蔽外（*正式测试与审查前已加入白名单*），未发现过滤器问题。 > 2. 以下议题可能与此问题有关: > -#229486. > -#229490. > --AdGuardTeam/AdGuardDNS#1023 ``` Username: @Tayg2048 ``` ### Screenshots

This issue has been automatically marked as stale because it has been open for 3 days with no activity.
Unfortunately, our resources are limited and we can not always take the time to respond to requests about websites that are not popular enough. The issue will be closed if no further activity occurs.
Please note, that AdGuard Filters is an open-source project that is used by different content blockers and we welcome contributions. If you have some technical knowledge about how websites work, you are welcome to create a pull request following [these instructions](https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md).

- [x] This site DOES NOT contain sexually explicit material, otherwise use [NSFW-specific form](./new?template=bug_report_NSFW.yml);
- [x] Filters were updated before reproducing an issue;
- [x] AdGuard product version is up-to-date;
- [x] Browser version is up-to-date;
- [x] If the site or app is broken, disabling AdGuard protection resolves an issue.

### What product do you use?

AdGuard for Windows

### AdGuard version

5.4.3.41

### What type of problem have you encountered?

Missed ads or ad leftovers

### Which browser(s) do you use?

Chrome

### Which device do you use?

Desktop

### Where is the problem encountered?

https://player.videasy.to/movie/299534

### Ad Blocking

AdGuard Base filter

### Privacy

EasyPrivacy

### Social Widgets

_No response_

_No response_

_No response_

### Other

_No response_

### DNS filters

_No response_

### Language-specific

_No response_

### What Stealth Mode options do you have enabled?

_No response_

### Add your comment and screenshots

Hello! The domain for the Videasy player has recently changed from videasy.net to videasy.to.

Could you please duplicate/update the existing filters for videasy.net to also include the new .to TLD?

For context, here are the existing rules that need the videasy.to domain added:

SpywareFilter/sections/specific.txt (||users.videasy.net/api/track)
BaseFilter/sections/general_extensions.txt (videasy.net popunder rules)
BaseFilter/sections/allowlist_stealth.txt (player.videasy.net stealth rules)
AnnoyancesFilter/Other/sections/tweaks.txt (player.videasy.net context menu tweaks)
Thank you!

### Privacy

- [x] I agree to follow this condition

comment.body:
This issue has been automatically marked as stale because it has been open for 3 days with no activity.
Unfortunately, our resources are limited and we can not always take the time to respond to requests about websites that are not popular enough. The issue will be closed if no further activity occurs.
Please note, that AdGuard Filters is an open-source project that is used by different content blockers and we welcome contributions. If you have some technical knowledge about how websites work, you are welcome to create a pull request following [these instructions](https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md).
